testCaseName: E2E: Full Hiring Lifecycle — Multiple Jobs, Multiple Candidates, Cascading Selections
testCaseDescription: End-to-end hiring lifecycle: Admin/Recruiter/Candidate registration, admin user visibility, multiple job creations, active job listings, multi-job applications, duplicate application prevention (400), per-recruiter job isolation, INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED and ON_HOLD status updates, real-time dashboard, cascading SELECTED trigger (auto-REJECTED + job deactivation), cross-job isolation, multi-recruiter independence, post-closure blocking (400 This position has been filled), job deletion, empty-state verification.

steps.step: Register Admin1: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Recruiter1: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Recruiter2: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Candidate1, Candidate2, Candidate3: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register (x3)
Admin1 views all registered users (AC-1): GET http://localhost:5000/api/admin/users
Recruiter1 creates Job1 (DevOps Engineer) (AC-2): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "DevOps Engineer",
  "description": "DevOps automation and CI/CD pipeline management",
  "location": "Bangalore, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "12,00,000 - 20,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Recruiter1 creates Job2 (QA Automation Engineer) (AC-2): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "QA Automation Engineer",
  "description": "API and UI automation using Java, TestNG and RestAssured",
  "location": "Pune, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "8,00,000 - 14,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Recruiter2 creates Job3 (Machine Learning Engineer) (AC-2): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Machine Learning Engineer",
  "description": "ML model development and deployment pipelines",
  "location": "Hyderabad, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "15,00,000 - 25,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Verify all 3 jobs active in listings (AC-2): GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Candidate1 applies to Job1 and Job2 (AC-3): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications (x2)
Candidate1 duplicate apply to Job1 — expects 400 (AC-3): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Candidate2 applies to Job1+Job3; Candidate3 applies to Job2+Job3 (AC-3): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications (x4)
Recruiter1 views Job1 applications only — per-job isolation (AC-4): GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/job/{jobId}
Recruiter1 updates Candidate1 Job1→INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED; Candidate2 Job1→ON_HOLD (AC-5): PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/{id}/status
Candidate1 verifies dashboard: Job1=INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED, Job2=PENDING — cross-job isolation (AC-5, AC-7): GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
Recruiter1 selects Candidate1 for Job1 (SELECTED) — cascading: all Job1 applicants auto-REJECTED, Job1 deactivated (AC-6): PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/1/status?status=SELECTED
Verify cascading: Candidate2 auto-REJECTED, Job1 absent from listings, Candidate1 Job2 still PENDING (AC-6, AC-7): GET /api/applications/job/1 + GET /api/jobs + GET /api/applications/my
Recruiter2 independently selects Candidate2 for Job3 — multi-recruiter independence (AC-8, AC-9): PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/4/status?status=SELECTED
Candidate3 applies to closed Job1 — expects 400 (AC-10): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Recruiter1 deletes Job2 — system integrity (AC-11): DELETE http://localhost:5000/api/jobs/{id}
Verify Job2 removed; system reaches empty active-jobs state (AC-11): GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
